subject: [PATCH 10/11] mm/zsmalloc: Handle single object charge migration in migrate_zspage

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the patch's handling of node migrations and suggested using a more straightforward approach to simplify the code. Also pointed out that the patch does not handle the case where the compressed object spans multiple pages.

reviews.author: Zi Yan
reviews.summary: Acknowledged David's concerns and suggested a revised approach to handle node migrations. Also pointed out that the patch needs to be updated to handle the case where the compressed object spans multiple pages.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series addresses memory migration issues in the zsmalloc subsystem, specifically handling single object charge migration and transfer of lruvec and node statistics during migration. The approach taken is to simplify the migration process by uncharging entirely from the source nodes and charging entirely to the destination nodes, rather than enumerating all possible combinations of node migrations.
